name: Promed
notes: No FMCSA SAFER carrier record found matching 'Promed' at 2166 S Jog Rd, Greenacres, FL. SAFER keyword search for PROMED returned 8 entities, none in Greenacres FL (closest FL match was PROMED WASTE SOLUTIONS LLC in Ocoee). Sunbiz FL entities named 'Promed' exist but none confirmed at 2166 S Jog Rd Greenacres; 'Promed Professional Medical Managers Inc' was administratively dissolved 1998 in Lakeland (different city). Cannot make confident match. Name is too generic and address is in a Jog Rd commercial corridor with multiple medical-services tenants. Recommend on-site/phone verification.

name: Prime Medicar Svc
notes: No FMCSA SAFER carrier record found matching 'Prime Medicar' or 'Prime Medicar Service' anywhere. SAFER keyword search for PRIME MEDICAR returned zero records; PRIME MEDI returned 4 carriers (Bakersfield CA, Columbus OH, Burnsville MN) — none in Chicago IL. 'Medicar' in Chicago is a City of Chicago BACP livery vehicle license category (medical car); operators in this category are typically intrastate and may not file with FMCSA. 6417 N Ravenswood Ave Suite 206 is a small office suite (Strauss Realty). Illinois SoS business search not directly accessible via web; no confirmed IL business entity record located. Sources block public bulk searches via CAPTCHA.

name: Care Ah Van Express LLC
notes: No FMCSA SAFER carrier record found matching 'Care Ah Van Express' in Missouri. SAFER keyword search for CARE A VAN / AH VAN returned no matching MO carriers (closest hit was CARE-A-VAN TRANSPORT LLC, USDOT 3979776, not in MO). A namesake company 'Care A Van Express Transportation' (careavanexpress.com) is actually based in Georgia (officers Brittany Bennett CEO, Keia Hebert CFO, Jessie Haynes Manager) and serves Atlanta-area counties (Newton, Rockdale, DeKalb, Fulton, Gwinnett, etc.) — does NOT match the St. Louis MO 4737 Nebraska Ave input. Missouri Secretary of State (bsd.sos.mo.gov) public search not directly accessible via WebFetch. No confident match; possibly operates without USDOT (intrastate NEMT under MO HealthNet) or under different legal name.

name: Heart To Heart Transportation
notes: Yellow Pages lists 'Heart To Heart Transportation' at Auburn, CA 95603 as CLOSED. FMCSA SAFER keyword searches for HEART TO HEART and HEART 2 HEART returned no California carriers — matches found in FL (Bartow, Altamonte Springs), VA, MI, IN, OR, but none in Auburn CA. The Altamonte Springs FL carrier (USDOT 1169912) is intrastate FL only — not the same operation. A similarly-named 'Heart to Heart Transportation' at 1281 Hassett Ave, Yuba City CA 95991 exists (founded ~1996, ground passenger transportation) but that is a different physical location ~40 miles north of Auburn. 164 Teamtrack Rd Auburn CA is an industrial property (LoopNet). Likely operating status: defunct/closed at this address. CA Secretary of State bizfile search not directly accessible via WebFetch.
